# ZPHS Mallelamadugu — Full Site Content

> Zilla Parishad High School (ZPHS) Mallelamadugu is a government secondary school in Mallelamadugu Village, Aswapuram Mandal, Bhadradri Kothagudem District, Telangana, India. Established in 1995. Teaches Classes 6 to 10 free of cost under the Government of Telangana.

Site URL: https://zphsmallelamadugu.github.io/

---

## Quick facts

- **Full name:** Zilla Parishad High School, Mallelamadugu
- **Common names:** ZPHS Mallelamadugu, ZPHS Mallemaadugu, Z.P.H.S. Mallelamadugu
- **Type:** Government Zilla Parishad High School (fully government-aided, no tuition fees)
- **Established:** 1995
- **Grades:** Classes 6, 7, 8, 9, 10
- **Medium of instruction:** English and Telugu
- **Affiliation:** Telangana State Board (SSC, 10th standard)
- **Operating authority:** Zilla Parishad, Bhadradri Kothagudem District, Government of Telangana
- **Headmaster:** K. Gopi Varaprasad Rao
- **Phone / WhatsApp (Headmaster):** +91 92471 71248
- **Admission enquiry WhatsApp:** +91 98482 98256
- **School hours:** Monday – Saturday, 9:00 AM – 4:30 PM (closed on government holidays)

## Address

Zilla Parishad High School, Mallelamadugu
Mallelamadugu Village,
Aswapuram Mandal,
Bhadradri Kothagudem District,
Telangana, India.

---

## Hero / Tagline

A rural school *shaping futures* for three decades.

ZPHS Mallelamadugu has served the children of our region since 1995 — with discipline, care and academic excellence. Admissions open for Classes 6 to 10.

Headline stats:
- **100%** pass percentage (2025-26)
- **551** mandal topper marks
- **04** students above 500
- **30+** years of service

---

## About

A government school that keeps *village dreams* alive.

For more than thirty years, ZPHS Mallelamadugu has been the quiet backbone of education in our mandal. We teach classes 6 through 10 — preparing students from surrounding villages for board examinations, competitive scholarships and life beyond.

Discipline, regular attendance and respect for elders are woven into daily school life. Children who pass through our corridors are known across the region for their composure and clarity of thought.

We are a fully government-aided Zilla Parishad High School — which means every child studies without tuition fees, receives free textbooks and uniforms, and a warm mid-day meal each school day.

### Message from the Headmaster

> "We believe that every child from every village deserves the same chance to rise. Our results this year prove what commitment looks like."
>
> — **K. Gopi Varaprasad Rao**, Headmaster, ZPHS Mallelamadugu

---

## Achievements (2025-26)

A year of *firsts* and records broken.

- **100% Pass Rate (2025-26):** Every tenth class student cleared the board exam — a milestone reflecting the school's commitment to every learner.
- **Mandal Topper (2025):** A ZPHS Mallelamadugu student secured 551 / 600 and stood first across the entire mandal in the 10th standard board examinations. Four students from the school crossed the 500-mark milestone this year.
- **NMMS Scholarships (4 years running):** Students have consistently qualified for the National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship for the past four consecutive years.
- **District Competitions (Ongoing):** Students actively represent Mallelamadugu at district-level academic, cultural and sports competitions.

---

## Facilities

Everything a student needs, *all free*.

The campus is modest but well-equipped. Government support combined with dedicated staff means every child gets the tools, meals and guidance required to thrive.

1. **Computer Lab** — Dedicated digital learning lab equipping students with foundational computing skills.
2. **Science Lab** — Hands-on experiments in physics, chemistry and biology for every secondary grade.
3. **Sports Ground** — Open sports area supporting kabaddi, kho-kho, cricket and athletics.
4. **Qualified Faculty** — Highly qualified teachers with deep commitment to student growth and discipline.
5. **Free Textbooks & Uniforms** — Government-provided textbooks and school uniforms for every enrolled student.
6. **Mid-Day Meal Scheme** — Nutritious mid-day meals served every school day, supporting learning and well-being.

---

## Admissions

**Enroll your child in Classes 6 to 10.**

Admissions for the upcoming academic year are currently open. Fill in the enquiry form on the website (sends a pre-filled WhatsApp message) or call the school to visit.

- No admission fees — fully government-aided
- Free textbooks, uniforms and mid-day meals
- Seats open for Classes 6, 7, 8, 9 and 10
- Priority for children from surrounding villages

**Speak to the Headmaster:** K. Gopi Varaprasad Rao — +91 92471 71248
**Online enquiry (WhatsApp):** +91 98482 98256

### Admission enquiry form fields
- Student's Name (required)
- Parent / Guardian Name (required)
- Class Applying For: Class 6 / Class 7 / Class 8 / Class 9 / Class 10 (required)
- Phone Number (required)
- Email (optional)
- Message (optional)

Submitting the form opens WhatsApp with the details pre-filled and sends them to +91 98482 98256.

---

## Contact

**Visit, call, or drop by during school hours.**

The school gates are always open to families of the community. Whether you want to enroll your child, support the school, or simply learn more — the staff are happy to host you.

- **Phone / WhatsApp:** K. Gopi Varaprasad Rao (Headmaster) — +91 92471 71248
- **Address:** Zilla Parishad High School, Mallelamadugu Village, Aswapuram Mandal, Bhadradri Kothagudem District, Telangana, India.
- **School Hours:** Monday – Saturday, 9:00 AM – 4:30 PM. Closed on government holidays.

---

## Identity

- Operates under: Government of Telangana — Zilla Parishad
- District: Bhadradri Kothagudem
- Mandal: Aswapuram
- Village: Mallelamadugu
- Logo / emblem on the website: Emblem of Telangana
